title: Best Oasis Weekly Recycling Market Report, 23 February 2024
section_path: Best Oasis Weekly Recycling Market Report, 23 February 2024
section_path_text: Best Oasis Weekly Recycling Market Report, 23 February 2024
summary:
Main
in Weekly Demolition Reports 23/02/2024
Over the past week, the ship recycling markets across various destinations have exhibited diverse trends. In India, the market has seen a slight uptick, marked by a modest increase in demand for vessels
Source: Best Oasis Limited

Linked asset: 2024-02-23_Weekly-Ship-Recycling-Report-17-February-23-February-2024_compressed.pdf

Weekly Ship Recycling Report
17 February 2024 - 23 February 2024
Visit : www.best-oasis.com Head Office: 3201, Saba Tower 1, Cluster E, Jumeirah Lake Towers, Dubai, U.A.E
Email: bol@bol.ae Contact: +971 4575 4667

[Page 2]
Highlights of the week
Over the past week, the ship recycling markets across various destinations have exhibited diverse trends. In India, the market has seen a slight uptick,
marked by a modest increase in demand for vessels, signaling a positive shift in market conditions.
